items.title: Mega Wall Street dealmakers are having their best year ever
items.description: In 2025, companies have announced 49 global 'mega deals,' the highest such count through the first nine months of any year ever.

items.title: Are You a Value Investor? This 1 Stock Could Be the Perfect Pick
items.description: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

items.title: Fed Pivots: What it Means for MS' Capital Markets Business
items.description: The Fed rate cut is set to revive corporate deals and trading, positioning Morgan Stanley's capital markets business for stronger growth.

items.title: Spotify downgraded at Goldman on valuation as growth priced in
items.description: Investing.com -- Goldman Sachs downgraded Spotify Technology to Neutral from Buy, saying much of the music streaming company’s growth potential is already reflected in the share price after a sharp rally over the past year.

items.title: Wall Street Braces for Government Shutdown Chaos
items.description: Fitting for 2025, a government shutdown is all but guaranteed to deliver even more uncertainty into the macroeconomic mix.
